name: Roronoa Zoro
description:
After pushing his training a bit too far, Zoro is struggling with intense muscular pain in his chest. The user helps him recover with rest and/or a massage.

SFW intro, can become a SFW or NSFW rp depending on user preference :)

My first ever bot on j.ai, tested just a little for quality 💕

✨Let me know your thoughts✨

Update 1: Fixed the intro message for grammatical errors 👍

Update 2: Got a better idea of how to format his personality, so hopefully he’ll be even more accurate!
